winner: Man finds 3D printer in New York City, prints out entire city by mistake.

candidates.text: Why don't 3D-printed guns ever apply for a lease in New York City? Because they always print and run!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a play on words ('print and run'), but the setup could be more specific to the headline for greater surprise and relevance."}

candidates.text: Why did the 3D-printed gun start dating a New Yorker? Because it heard they were easily assembled!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific to the headline, but the pun on 'assembled' feels a bit forced and lacks stronger comedic impact."}

candidates.text: In New York City, they've started printing 2D pancakes instead of 3D printed guns - because who needs a weapon when you can have a stack of flapjacks in the morning?
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the twist of pancakes over guns, but it feels a bit forced and lacks specificity to the headline. It's not particularly surprising or concise."}

candidates.text: A passerby in NYC was left speechless when he stumbled upon a statue garden, but upon closer inspection, realized that these statues were actually 3D-printed guns on display.
